Class BankService

java.lang.Object
com.bankcore.service.BankService
public class BankService extends Object
Core banking service that handles all business operations. Acts as the main entry point for account management, transactions, and financial operations in the BankCore system.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Haytam

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    BankService(AccountRepository accountRepository)
    Constructs a BankService with the given account repository.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    applyInterest(String accountId)
    Applies the annual interest rate to a savings account balance.
    void
    applyTax(String accountId, double taxRate)
    Applies a tax rate to the balance of a savings account.
    Account
    createAccount(Account account)
    Creates and persists a new bank account in the system.
    void
    deleteAccount(String accountId)
    Permanently deletes an account from the system.
    void

    Deposits the specified amount into the account and records the transaction.
    double
    getBalance(String accountId)
    Returns the current balance of the specified account.
    List<Transaction>
    getTransactionHistory(String accountId)
    Returns the full transaction history of the specified account.
    void
    transfer(String idAccountSender, String idAccountReceiver, double amount)
    Transfers the specified amount from one account to another.
    void
    withdraw(String accountId, double amount)
    Withdraws the specified amount from the account and records the transaction.

  • Constructor Details

    • BankService

      public BankService(AccountRepository accountRepository)
      Constructs a BankService with the given account repository.
      Parameters:
      accountRepository - the repository used for account storage and retrieval

  • Method Details

    • createAccount

      public Account createAccount(Account account)
      Creates and persists a new bank account in the system.
      Parameters:
      account - the account to create
      Returns:
      the created account

    • deleteAccount

      public void deleteAccount(String accountId) throws AccountNotFoundException
      Permanently deletes an account from the system.
      Parameters:
      accountId - the ID of the account to delete
      Throws:
      AccountNotFoundException - if no account exists with the given ID

    • deposit

      public void deposit(String accountId, double amount) throws AccountNotFoundException
      Deposits the specified amount into the account and records the transaction.
      Parameters:
      accountId - the ID of the account to deposit into
      amount - the amount to deposit — must be positive
      Throws:
      AccountNotFoundException - if no account exists with the given ID

    • withdraw

      public void withdraw(String accountId, double amount) throws AccountNotFoundException, InsufficientFundsException
      Withdraws the specified amount from the account and records the transaction.
      Parameters:
      accountId - the ID of the account to withdraw from
      amount - the amount to withdraw — must be positive and not exceed balance
      Throws:
      AccountNotFoundException - if no account exists with the given ID
      InsufficientFundsException - if the amount exceeds the available balance

    • transfer

      public void transfer(String idAccountSender, String idAccountReceiver, double amount) throws AccountNotFoundException, InsufficientFundsException
      Transfers the specified amount from one account to another. Records a transaction on both the sender and receiver accounts.
      Parameters:
      idAccountSender - the ID of the account sending the money
      idAccountReceiver - the ID of the account receiving the money
      amount - the amount to transfer — must be positive
      Throws:
      AccountNotFoundException - if either account does not exist
      InsufficientFundsException - if the sender has insufficient funds

    • getBalance

      public double getBalance(String accountId) throws AccountNotFoundException
      Returns the current balance of the specified account.
      Parameters:
      accountId - the ID of the account
      Returns:
      the current balance as a double
      Throws:
      AccountNotFoundException - if no account exists with the given ID

    • getTransactionHistory

      public List<Transaction> getTransactionHistory(String accountId) throws AccountNotFoundException
      Returns the full transaction history of the specified account.
      Parameters:
      accountId - the ID of the account
      Returns:
      a list of all transactions made by this account
      Throws:
      AccountNotFoundException - if no account exists with the given ID

    • applyInterest

      public void applyInterest(String accountId) throws AccountNotFoundException
      Applies the annual interest rate to a savings account balance. The interest amount is calculated internally based on the account's interest rate. Records the operation as an INTEREST transaction.
      Parameters:
      accountId - the ID of the savings account
      Throws:
      AccountNotFoundException - if no account exists with the given ID
      IllegalArgumentException - if the account is not a SavingsAccount

    • applyTax

      public void applyTax(String accountId, double taxRate) throws AccountNotFoundException
      Applies a tax rate to the balance of a savings account. The tax amount is deducted from the current balance. Records the operation as a TAX transaction.
      Parameters:
      accountId - the ID of the savings account
      taxRate - the tax rate to apply — must be between 0 and 1 exclusive
      Throws:
      AccountNotFoundException - if no account exists with the given ID
      IllegalArgumentException - if the account is not a SavingsAccount
